channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Profile of Vanessa Pulgarin, First-Ever MGI All Stars Titleholder
item.description: This article published by ABS-CBN introduces Vanessa Pulgarin, highlighting her recognition as the first-ever MGI All Stars titleholder. The feature is presented as a brief profile designed to give re...

item.title: Paul Onuachu wins Süper Lig Goal of the Season for 2025/26 season
item.description: Paul Onuachu, the Nigerian Super Eagles striker, has been named the winner of the Süper Lig Goal of the Season award for the 2025/26 campaign after scoring a spectacular bicycle kick for Trabzonspor. ...

item.title: Interview Examines Links Between the War on Terror and the Rise of Right-Wing Extremism in the U.S.
item.description: This article summarizes a discussion between journalist Chris Hedges and investigative reporter Matt Kennard about the long-term political and social consequences of the War on Terror in the United St...

item.title: Telangana CM urges crop diversification and water-saving farming as below-normal monsoon rainfall expected
item.description: Chief Minister A. Revanth Reddy has directed officials in Telangana to actively promote crop diversification among farmers in view of forecasts indicating below-normal rainfall during the upcoming mon...

item.title: Man hospitalised after stabbing near Emirates Stadium as 16 arrested during Arsenal title parade
item.description: A man was taken to hospital after being stabbed near Arsenal’s Emirates Stadium following the club’s Premier League title parade in north London. The incident occurred at approximately 9:33 pm on Horn...

item.title: Media Power and the Changing Ownership of Modern Football
item.description: This opinion piece explains how football has shifted from being just a sport into a powerful global media business. It highlights that while matches still matter, the real growth of football today is ...

item.title: Parliamentary Committee Faces Intense Negotiations Over Ramaphosa Impeachment Chair
item.description: On the eve of the inaugural meeting of the parliamentary impeachment committee investigating President Cyril Ramaphosa's handling of the Phala Phala case, intense lobbying has been reported within pol...

item.title: Philippines and Vietnam Strengthen Defense Cooperation Amid South China Sea Tensions
item.description: MANILA — The Philippines and Vietnam have reaffirmed their defense partnership in a move aimed at enhancing maritime security and promoting peace in the contested areas of the South China Sea. Both na...

item.title: EAC health ministers hold emergency talks to coordinate response to Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda
item.description: East African Community (EAC) health ministers are holding a special virtual meeting today and tomorrow to coordinate a joint regional response to the ongoing Ebola outbreak affecting the Democratic Re...

item.title: Adult content creator Bonnie Blue announces unconventional pregnancy celebration
item.description: Adult content creator Bonnie Blue, whose real name is Tia Billinger, has announced plans for an unconventional baby shower in June, describing the event as her next public stunt. In an interview with ...

item.title: Gachagua criticises Madaraka Day celebrations in Wajir, raises concerns over service delivery and governance
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has openly criticised President William Ruto over the decision to host the 63rd Madaraka Day celebrations in Wajir County. In a strongly worded statement share...

item.title: Paul Onuachu wins Turkish Süper Lig Goal of the Season for stunning bicycle kick
item.description: Super Eagles striker Paul Onuachu has been recognised for a standout moment in the 2025/26 Turkish Süper Lig season after winning the Goal of the Season award. The Trabzonspor forward earned the honou...

item.title: US court delays sentencing of Nikhil Gupta in alleged murder-for-hire case targeting Sikh activist
item.description: A US federal court in New York has postponed the sentencing of Nikhil Gupta, an Indian national who has pleaded guilty in a murder-for-hire conspiracy case involving an alleged plot to assassinate Sik...

item.title: Amboy Burger in Los Angeles Ranks 9th Among the World’s Best Burgers
item.description: A Filipino-American burger spot in Los Angeles, Amboy, has gained global recognition after being ranked number nine among the world’s best burgers. The restaurant is led by Filipino-American chef Alvi...

item.title: 13-year-old girl dies after river incident near Burnsall in North Yorkshire
item.description: A 13-year-old girl has died following a water incident in the River Wharfe near Burnsall, a popular beauty spot in the Yorkshire Dales, North Yorkshire. The teenager was reported missing at around 18:...

item.title: Poll shows gap between viral Nigerian fashion moments and industry earnings
item.description: A recent BusinessDay Gen Z 2026 poll has raised fresh concerns about the state of Nigeria’s fashion industry, especially around how viral moments like the Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) t...

item.title: Bandit Informants and Sponsors Fueling Insecurity in Nigeria
item.description: The article takes a hard look at the growing insecurity problem in Nigeria, especially the activities of bandits and the people allegedly supporting or informing them from within society and governmen...

item.title: Madlanga commission of inquiry continues with day 110 witness testimony
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, which is investigating serious allegations of criminality, political interference, and corruption within South Africa’s criminal justice system, continued its proce...

item.title: Criticism of delayed Victorian government action on corruption watchdog powers amid Big Build allegations
item.description: This opinion piece by investigative journalist Nick McKenzie criticises Victorian Premier Jacinta Allan over what is portrayed as a delayed and insufficient response to allegations of corruption linke...

item.title: Readers debate environmental leadership, politics, and public policy in June 1 letters
item.description: This collection of letters to the editor presents a range of reader perspectives on Canadian politics, environmental leadership, military policy, social media regulation, cultural experiences, and bod...
